debt.zeroHeader: You don't have any benefit overpayments
debt.zeroBody: Our records show you don't have any benefit overpayments. If you think this is incorrect, contact us.

copay.linkText: Review details and resolve copay bills
copay.zeroHeader: You don't have any copay bills
copay.zeroBody: Our records show that you haven't received a copay bill in the past 6 months. If you think this is incorrect, contact us.

error.heading: We can't access your {{type}} records right now
error.body: We're sorry. Something went wrong on our end. Refresh this page or try again later. If you need help now, contact us.

notEnrolled.header: You're not enrolled in VA health care
notEnrolled.body: Our records show that you're not enrolled in VA health care. If you think this is incorrect, call us at <1>phone</1> (<2>tty</2>). We're here Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. ET.
